hero.tagline: SUV style. Hatchback soul. Turbo heart.

overview.minides: A bold coupe-inspired crossover with turbo power, premium features, and everyday practicality — the Fronx brings style to city driving.
overview.description: The Maruti Suzuki Fronx is a Baleno-based coupe-crossover SUV sold exclusively through Nexa outlets. Available in 16 variants across 6 trims: Sigma, Delta, Delta Plus, Zeta, and Alpha. Engine options include a 1.2L K-Series NA Petrol (88 bhp), a 1.0L Boosterjet Turbo Petrol (98.7 bhp) with 6MT or 6AT, and a 1.2L CNG. Top-spec Alpha gets 360-degree camera, HUD, cruise control, Suzuki Connect, 9-inch wireless infotainment, and 6 airbags standard. No sunroof on any variant.

petrol_1_2.name: 1.2L K-Series Dual Jet, Dual VVT Petrol
